No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to eradicating poverty or its targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and introduces French society, traditions, customs, and culture, fostering appreciation of cultural diversity, aligning with Target 4.7.
